prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e4941b18`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: the `2` moves onto the original `8` cell, and the `8` relocates to the bottom row of the `5` rectangle one column outside its left or right edge depending on whether the original `2` was to the right or left.

Implemented the task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4941b18/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4941b18/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4941b18/generator.py#L1). I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` correction was needed. The generator stays close to the task family with odd square grids, orange background, a single bottom-anchored gray rectangle, and exactly two markers on the row immediately above it. No new shared primitive was added.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verification `4/4`, shared build produced `1000` examples, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looked visually on-family. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4941b18/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4941b18/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4941b18/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4941b18/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4941b18/previews/preview_03.png).
